title: Expeditions Involving Ibn Abi Hadrad and Abu Qatadah
description: Qatadah In Sha'ban of this year630 the Messenger of God sent out a party of men under the command of Abu Qatadah. According to Ibn l;iumayd-Salamah-Ibn Ishaq-Yahya b. Said al-Angari631-Muhammad b. Ibrahim -'Abdallah b. Abi I;iadrad al-Aslami, who said:632 I married a woman from my tribe, promising her a nuptial gift (,sadaq) of Zoo dirhams. Then I came to the Messenger of God to seek his assistance with my marriage.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
